urdu transliteration text:
bolay padar se akbar barchi na khaynchnaAkbar said to his father, don’t pull out the spearEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

english translation text: I still have some life left in me, don’t pull out the spear

urdu transliteration text:
baba nazar ko phayr lo dum tootne lagabarchi ke phal se khoon hai dil ka ruka huaubhlega khoon zameen par barchi na khaynchna
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Baba turn away your face for I am about to die
The spearhead has stopped my heart from bleeding,
If you do, the blood will gush out, don’t pull out the spear

I just called you here so I could tell you,
Please don’t be sorrowful for my heart is at peace
Keep sitting by my side but

urdu transliteration text:
amma ko ye khabar na ho mere sina lagighash aagaya hai bas zara shiddat ki pyas kimai aa raha hoo jao ghar barchi na khaynchna
@HujjatELC
You go back, I am coming
Don’t pull out the spear
english translation text:
Mother should not find out that I was shot by a spear
I just fell unconscious because of the intense thirst

Hussain said, You are trying to console your father
But I know where you are going from here
You are turning away your face and saying

Your breathing is getting heavy and your pulse is low,
You are in agony and I know your state of patience
You are holding your chest and saying

urdu transliteration text:
akbar pukare baap se dil ko sambhaliyetooti sina kaleje may rehne hi dijiyeniklega saath may jigar barchi na khaynchna
Akbar pleaded to his father to stay calm
Don’t pull out the spear
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Let the broken arrow remain in my chest
For my heart will come out with it

urdu transliteration text:
maula ne ya ali kaha dil ko sambhaal karphir khud hi ladkhada gaye barchi nikaal karkehta raha jawan pisar barchi na khaynchna
Maula gathered his strength and cried Ya Ali
Then he himself stumbled after taking out the spear
The young son kept saying, don’t pull out the spear
@HujjatELC

rehan saath barchi ke dil bhi nikal padapadthe rahe hussain bhi ta dayr marsiyamaa kehti aayi nange sar barchi na khaynchna
Husain kept lamenting for a long time
His mother came out crying, don’t pull out the spear
@HujjatELC
english translation text: His heart came out with the spear
